context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Magento PHP APIs for reading and writing scoped configuration (WriterInterface, ScopeConfigInterface with ScopeInterface constants) and correctly assigns products to a website, including cache invalidation after config writes.

checklist.name: WriterInterface for config writes
checklist.description: Config writes use Magento\Framework\App\Config\Storage\WriterInterface (via $configWriter->save()) rather than direct database writes or other mechanisms

checklist.name: SCOPE_WEBSITE constant for website reads
checklist.description: Reading website-scoped config uses ScopeInterface::SCOPE_WEBSITE (from Magento\Store\Model\ScopeInterface), not a raw string

checklist.name: SCOPE_STORE constant for store reads
checklist.description: Reading store-view-scoped config uses ScopeInterface::SCOPE_STORE (from Magento\Store\Model\ScopeInterface), not a raw string

checklist.name: ScopeConfigInterface for reads
checklist.description: Config reads use Magento\Framework\App\Config\ScopeConfigInterface (via $scopeConfig->getValue()) rather than direct database or other access

checklist.name: Config cache flushed after write
checklist.description: After writing config values, the code cleans the config cache (e.g., CacheTypeListInterface::cleanType('config') or equivalent)

checklist.name: Product assigned via ProductResource
checklist.description: Product-to-website assignment uses ProductResource (Magento\Catalog\Model\ResourceModel\Product) and its websiteToProducts() method or equivalent API, not direct SQL

checklist.name: Website-specific pricing approach
checklist.description: Website-specific price setting references tier prices with website scope OR the catalog price scope setting, NOT a simple direct price attribute assignment

checklist.name: Dependency injection used
checklist.description: Classes receive dependencies (WriterInterface, ScopeConfigInterface, ProductResource, etc.) via constructor injection rather than using ObjectManager directly

checklist.name: StoreManagerInterface used for website lookup
checklist.description: Website or store objects are retrieved via StoreManagerInterface (e.g., getWebsite($code)) rather than hardcoded IDs

checklist.name: String codes for scope references
checklist.description: Scope references in config reads/writes use string codes (e.g., 'wholesale_site') not hardcoded numeric IDs
